description_long: This shotgun features a highly stylized, almost organic design with a dark, metallic body and intricate, spiked details along the frame. The twin barrels are robust and cylindrical, with a weathered, bone-like texture on the upper surfaces and dark, metallic finishes on the lower portions. The grip is curved and claw-like, with sharp, pointed extensions and a glossy, black finish, giving it an aggressive, almost creature-like appearance. The receiver area is adorned with silver, vein-like patterns and jagged edges, enhancing its menacing aesthetic. The muzzle end is reinforced and slightly flared, while the rear of the weapon is compact, lacking a traditional stock. Overall, the shotgun combines elements of fantasy and industrial design, making it visually striking and unique.
description: A dark, intricately detailed shotgun with twin barrels, spiked accents, and a claw-like grip, blending metallic and bone-like textures for a menacing, fantasy-inspired look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the twin barrels, spiked frame, and curved, claw-like grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two large, cylindrical barrels and the pointed muzzle, emphasizing the weapon's double-barrel configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the mirrored details of the barrels and grip, with visible vein-like patterns and spiked accents.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact back end and the pronounced, pointed extensions of the grip, with the barrels receding into the background.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length and diameter, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
